scripts.core-demo: rm -f data/core-demo.sqlite* && BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo DATABASE_PATH=./data/core-demo.sqlite ADMIN_IDS=1 tsx scripts/core-demo.ts
scripts.demo: rm -f data/demo-loop.sqlite* && BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo-dummy-token DATABASE_PATH=./data/demo-loop.sqlite ADMIN_IDS=1 NEAR_AI_API_KEY= tsx scripts/demo-loop.ts
scripts.queue-demo: rm -f data/queue-demo.sqlite* && BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo DATABASE_PATH=./data/queue-demo.sqlite ADMIN_IDS=1 tsx scripts/queue-demo.ts
scripts.edge-demo: rm -f data/edge-demo.sqlite* && BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo DATABASE_PATH=./data/edge-demo.sqlite ADMIN_IDS=1 BOT_USERNAME=DemoBot NEAR_AI_API_KEY= NOTIFY_RATE_PER_SEC=1000 tsx scripts/edge-demo.ts
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run core-demo && npm run demo && npm run queue-demo && npm run edge-demo
